meta.title: Safety Pharmacology Training Dataset — Final Scorecard (SUPERSEDED)
meta.historical_note: This file reflects state after Pass 4 only (composite 86.4/100, D1 80/100, 26 PARTIALLY_VERIFIED). Retained for audit trail. Do not use for current scores.
passes_completed: Pass 1: Initial verification (S7A, S7B, E14/S7B Q&As, E14, S6(R1), S10, M3(R2) pp.1-20)
Pass 2: Gap-closure (M3(R2) pp.21-31, E11(R1) Addendum, IWG 2024 Concept Paper)
Pass 3: Final-4 verification (FDA CGT guidance, WHO vaccines Annex 1, M4S(R2), ICH S9)
Pass 4: FIX-003 — M3(R2) doc pages 17-20 direct verbatim re-read; 3 PARTIALLY_VERIFIED rules upgraded to VERIFIED

rules_basis.gap_of_12_note: Estimated total of 144 exceeds tracked count of 132. Gap represents rules in scope not yet enumerated in structured rules file.

D1_rule_verification_depth.label: Rule Verification Depth — Fully Verified / Total Tracked

pass4_upgrades: before_phase_3.other_before_phase_3_verification_status: PARTIALLY_VERIFIED → VERIFIED (M3(R2) Section 11.1 and 11.3 direct quotes)
before_marketing_approval.other_items_verification_status: PARTIALLY_VERIFIED → VERIFIED (M3(R2) Section 10 and 11.3 direct quotes)
incorporation_into_toxicology_studies.applicable_contexts_verification_status: PARTIALLY_VERIFIED → VERIFIED (S9 Section 2.2 confirmed in Pass 3, now applied)

D1_rule_verification_depth.root_cause: 26 rules remain PARTIALLY_VERIFIED. Root causes: (a) ADC/oligo/peptide modality rules blocked by IWG Q&As not yet in source set; (b) safety pharmacology regional differences blocked by FDA/EMA standalone guidance not in source set; (c) minor items (out_of_scope, CNS abuse liability, well-characterized PK/PD exception, combination drugs, J-Tpeakc biomarker, 20 bpm HR threshold) not directly quoted from source PDFs.

D2_gap1_exploratory_trials.label: Gap-1: Exploratory Clinical Trials — Approaches Fully Verified

detail.approach_2: VERIFIED — M3(R2) Table 3, Section 7 (tox: 7-day repeat-dose in one species added)
detail.source_correction: Prior citation 'Table 1' corrected to 'Table 3, Section 7' — Table 1 covers repeat-dose duration; Table 3 covers exploratory approaches.

D3_gap2_modality_considerations.label: Gap-2: Modality Considerations — Topics Fully Covered

detail.gene_therapies: VERIFIED (Pass 3) — FDA CGT guidance Section III.B.5 confirms no standalone safety pharmacology section; functional parameters embedded in comprehensive toxicology study design (behavioral, neurological, cardiac assessments)
detail.vaccines: VERIFIED (Pass 3) — WHO Nonclinical Evaluation of Vaccines (TRS 927, Annex 1) Section 4 confirms no standalone safety pharmacology section; safety addressed entirely through toxicity assessment framework
detail.antibody_drug_conjugates: PARTIALLY_VERIFIED — S6(R1) species selection and genotoxicity exemption confirmed; dedicated S7B/E14 safety pharmacology approach for ADCs pending IWG second-round Q&As
detail.oligonucleotides: PARTIALLY_VERIFIED — S6(R1) 'may apply' confirmed; S10 photosafety exclusion confirmed; dedicated safety pharmacology scope pending IWG Q&As
detail.peptides: PARTIALLY_VERIFIED — S10 photosafety exclusion confirmed; no peptide-specific deviations from S7A identified; IWG Q&As may clarify

D3_gap2_modality_considerations.blocking_factor: ICH E14/S7B second-round Q&As for novel modalities (ADC, oligo, peptides). IWG Concept Paper (March 2024) anticipated ~18 month timeline; Q&As may have been published by March 2026 but are not in the training source set.

D4_gap3_regional_differences.label: Gap-3: Regional Differences — Topics Fully Covered

detail.us_embryo_fetal_deferral: VERIFIED — M3(R2) Section 11.3: US allows deferral to before Phase III for WOCBP with precautions
detail.eu_japan_embryo_fetal: VERIFIED — M3(R2) Section 11.3: EU and Japan require definitive developmental tox studies before exposure of WOCBP
detail.local_tolerance_iv_route: VERIFIED — M3(R2) Section 8: US generally does not require local tolerance studies for IV; Japan and EU recommend single-dose paravenous for IV route
detail.safety_pharm_specific_regional: UNRESOLVED — safety pharmacology-specific regional differences (if any beyond ICH harmonization) not confirmed from available source set; would require FDA S7A implementation guidance or EMA S7A/S7B reflection papers

D4_gap3_regional_differences.blocking_factor: FDA implementation guidance for S7A (e.g., FDA guidance documents on safety pharmacology) and EMA reflection papers not available in training source set.

D5_gap4_proarrhythmia.label: Gap-4: Proarrhythmia Model Qualification — Criteria Covered

detail.criterion_1: Defined endpoint consistent with context of use — VERIFIED
detail.criterion_2: Fully disclosed algorithm for model development — VERIFIED
detail.criterion_3: Defined domain of applicability/scope — ADDED in Pass 2 (was missing)
detail.criterion_4: Prespecified analysis plan and criteria to assess model predictivity — VERIFIED
detail.criterion_5: Mechanistic interpretation — ADDED in Pass 2 (was missing)

D6_gap5_iwg_2024.label: Gap-5: IWG 2024 — New Guidance Applicable
D6_gap5_iwg_2024.detail: E14/S7B IWG Final Concept Paper (March 2024) read in full. Confirmed as planning document only — proposes second-round Q&As; no finalized guidance applicable to current rules. Meta annotation updated. Novel modality rules remain best-available guidance pending Q&A development.

detail.ctd_placement: VERIFIED — Module 4, section 4.2.1.3 confirmed from M4S(R2) document page 12
detail.s9_anticancer_integration: VERIFIED — Section 2.2 confirmed; endpoints incorporated into general tox studies; standalone studies not called for
detail.gene_therapy_safety_pharm: VERIFIED — FDA CGT guidance has no standalone section; functional safety embedded in tox study design (Section III.B.5)
detail.vaccine_safety_pharm: VERIFIED — WHO vaccine guidelines have no standalone safety pharmacology section; Section 4 toxicity assessment is the governing framework

rule_counts_final.note: Coverage 100% means 0 unresolved (unverifiable or NHR). Full_verification 80.3% means 26/132 rules are verified but not to full-text confirmation standard. Pass 4 (FIX-003) upgraded 3 rules: before_phase_3 timing, before_marketing_approval timing, and incorporation_into_toxicology S9 context.
